services.name: Carpet Cleaning
services.summary: Hot water extraction and practical carpet care for homes, rentals, offices, and commercial spaces.
services.intro: Professional carpet cleaning using proper equipment, practical stain advice, and methods suited to the carpet and the condition of the room.
benefits: Helps remove soil, marks, and odours
Suitable for homes, rentals, and workplaces

faqs.question: How long does carpet take to dry?
faqs.answer: Most carpets dry within a few hours depending on airflow, carpet type, and weather conditions.

faqs.question: Do you treat stains first?
faqs.answer: Yes. Visible marks and traffic lanes are assessed and pre-treated before the main clean.

services.name: Upholstery Cleaning
services.summary: Careful cleaning for fabric furniture, chairs, mattresses, and high-use upholstered surfaces.
services.intro: Upholstery cleaning helps refresh fabric furniture and remove everyday build-up from couches, chairs, mattresses, and workplace seating.
benefits: Useful for family homes and rentals
Suitable for many common upholstery fabrics

faqs.question: Can every fabric be wet cleaned?
faqs.answer: No. Fabric type matters, so the technician checks the material and chooses a suitable method.

services.name: Stain Treatment
services.summary: Targeted treatment for spills, pet issues, traffic marks, and problem spots before full cleaning.
services.intro: Stain treatment focuses on the areas that need extra attention, from everyday spills to deeper marks that need a more careful approach.
benefits: Can be paired with carpet or upholstery cleaning
process: Identify the stain type where possible
Review the result and advise honestly

faqs.question: Can every stain be removed?
faqs.answer: Not always. Some marks become permanent, but proper treatment gives the best chance of improvement.

services.name: Flood Restoration
services.summary: Fast water damage response, extraction, drying support, and restoration guidance.
services.intro: Flood restoration is for urgent water damage situations where fast response, extraction, drying equipment, and practical restoration advice matter.
benefits: Fast response for urgent water issues
process: Monitor and advise on next steps

faqs.question: Should I call immediately?
faqs.answer: Yes. The sooner water damage is handled, the better the chance of reducing secondary damage.

services.name: Gutter Cleaning
services.summary: Removal of gutter debris to help water flow properly around homes and commercial buildings.
services.intro: Gutter cleaning helps keep rainwater moving away from the property by clearing leaves, build-up, and blockages.
benefits: Suitable for residential and light commercial properties

faqs.question: How often should gutters be cleaned?
faqs.answer: It depends on nearby trees and exposure, but many properties benefit from seasonal checks.

services.name: Hard Floor Cleaning & Polish
services.summary: Cleaning and polishing for selected hard floor surfaces that need a deeper finish.
services.intro: Hard floor cleaning and polishing helps refresh suitable floors that need more than a normal mop can provide.
benefits: Useful for homes and commercial spaces

faqs.question: Can every hard floor be polished?
faqs.answer: No. The method depends on the floor material, finish, and current condition.

services.name: Carpet Repair
services.summary: Repair support for selected carpet damage, joins, lifting, and practical restoration issues.
services.intro: Carpet repair helps with selected damage and problem areas where replacement may not be the first or only option.
benefits: Useful for rental and localised damage

faqs.question: Can damaged carpet always be repaired?
faqs.answer: Not always. The repair depends on the carpet type, spare material, and the kind of damage.

services.name: Pest Control
services.summary: Pest treatment options for common household and commercial pest issues.
services.intro: Pest control supports homes and businesses dealing with common pests that need targeted treatment and practical advice.
benefits: Can be paired with cleaning or property maintenance

faqs.question: Do I need to leave the property?
faqs.answer: That depends on the treatment used. The technician will advise before any work begins.

services.name: Solar Panel Cleaning
services.summary: Solar panel cleaning to remove dust, grime, pollen, and build-up that can reduce panel performance.
services.intro: Solar panel cleaning helps panels work efficiently by removing the layer of dust, grime, pollen, and weather build-up that accumulates over time.
benefits: Useful after dry or dusty periods
Suitable for residential and commercial solar arrays

faqs.question: Why clean solar panels?
faqs.answer: Dirty panels can lose performance. Regular cleaning helps panels capture sunlight more effectively.

services.name: Window Cleaning
services.summary: Streak-free residential and commercial window cleaning to keep glass bright and clear.
services.intro: Professional window cleaning for homes and businesses across Central Otago and the Southern Lakes, using safe methods suited to each building and its access.
benefits: Improves your view and natural light
Suitable for homes, rentals, offices, and shopfronts
process: Clean glass, frames, and sills where practical

faqs.question: How often should windows be cleaned?
faqs.answer: The dry climate, dust, and seasonal weather can build up quickly on glass, so many properties benefit from regular cleaning through the year.
